steps.title: Identify the dimensions
steps.content: The width is $w$ feet. The length is $49$ times the width, so the length is $49w$ feet.

steps.title: Connect the expression to area
steps.content: Area is length times width. In $$y=(49w)(w)$$ the factor $w$ is the width, so the factor $49w$ is the length.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: $49w$ represents the length of the rectangle, in feet. The length of the rectangle, in feet is correct.
